prompt: A dark epic Chinese fantasy poster centered on the single gold calligraphy character 欲 dominating the upper left, rendered in huge textured brushed gold ink with rough edges and metallic leaf-like highlights. The scene is a cavernous infernal passage in deep black, bronze, and molten amber tones, lit by a blinding sacred glow at the top of a long stone staircase. At the top center-right stands an ornate golden lotus lamp or ritual chalice radiating holy light like a sun halo. In the lower center, show 1 lone ragged human figure from behind, slim and exhausted, wearing tattered dark robes shredded by the wind, reaching one arm upward toward the light while standing on a cracked stone path that becomes stairs. Flowing through the composition are 6 visible crimson silk ribbons or smoke-like fabric strands curling dramatically from left, right, and foreground, adding motion. Carve or inscribe 5 clearly visible Chinese characters onto broken stone slabs along the path and lower foreground: 情, 贪, 嗔, 痴, 慢, each glowing faintly in warm gold. Build the cave walls from writhing organic rock and shadow, with 3 large ghostly human faces emerging from the stone on the left and right sides, as if embodiments of temptation and suffering. Include 2 monstrous clawed hands reaching inward from the lower right toward the traveler. On the left side beneath the large title character, place 1 vertical block of elegant Chinese poem text in small gold calligraphy, plus 1 red seal stamp beside it. Along the bottom margin, add 1 horizontal line of small gold Chinese text with decorative dividers and the central highlighted character 心, plus 1 additional small red seal at the lower right. The overall style is cinematic, ultra-detailed, mythic, spiritual, and ominous, mixing Buddhist allegory, dark fantasy, and premium poster design; volumetric lighting, glowing dust, dramatic contrast, intricate brush typography, high detail, vertical composition.
